title: LIFELINE CONNECTIONS - 211info
text: LIFELINE CONNECTIONS VA CAMPUS LIFELINE CONNECTIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Specializes in mental health and substance use disorder outpatient services including individual and group counseling, mental health and substance use disorder assessments, detox, residential, outpatient, and integrated care. 1601 E Fourth Plain Boulevard Suite A212 Vancouver, WA 98663 Eligibility: Unrestricted, some outpatient programs are available for the Deaf or hard of hearing Hours: Office: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Detox: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Assessments: Monday-Thursday noon-3pm MAR Rapid Response: Wednesday 9am-11am Email (360) 397-8246 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (360) 397-8246 Main phone (360) 719-4430 Outpatient Program Deaf and Hard of Hearing Toll-free (800) 604-0025 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in; detoxification beds available until filled. Visit website or call for more information. FEES: Varies by service. Accepts Oregon Health Plan/Health Share and most major private insurance plans; sliding scale available. DOCUMENTS: Proof of insurance, proof of income, photo ID LANGUAGES: English, American Sign Language (ASL), interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: C-Tran The Vine green line. Located on the VA Campus in the Clark County Center for Community Health Building 17. Services: Assessment for Substance Use Disorders Community Mental Health Agencies Comprehensive Outpatient Substance Use Disorder Treatment Comprehensive Outpatient Substance Use Disorder Treatment * Deafness Detoxification Detoxification * Deafness Residential Substance Use Disorder Treatment Facilities Residential Substance Use Disorder Treatment Facilities * Deafness If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LIFELINE CONNECTIONS VA CAMPUS
